title: Case
description: A de-identified DVS case — the work DVS Care Coordinators do after an assistance request/referral is opened, including its service type and outcome. Canonical schema reconciling 'Department of Veterans' Services Cases' (pw4e-vms3, 9 columns). Note 'Started as Assistance Request' and 'Case is Referred', which tie a case back to an AssistanceRequest and forward to a referral.

startedAsAssistanceRequest.description: Whether the case began as an assistance request ('Started as Assistance Request').

caseIsReferred.description: Whether the case was referred out ('Case is Referred').
